expectations.text: The agent reads DATABASE_URL from .env.local or .env (not hardcodes it)
expectations.evidence: Agent did read the .env file using Glob and Read tools to find DATABASE_URL

expectations.text: The agent runs the bundled scripts/generate_chart.py
expectations.evidence: Agent wrote its own generate_chart.py script rather than using the skill's bundled script; then was blocked by Bash permission denial

expectations.text: The agent reports the saved chart path to the user
expectations.evidence: Chart was never generated — agent could not run Python due to Bash permission denial after 48 tool calls
